meta.feed_title: Latest World News on Fox News

items.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister after devastating Labour revolt and local election losses
items.summary: British PM Keir Starmer announced his resignation after Labour's devastating local election losses and a mounting revolt from within his own party ranks.

items.title: US military conducts strike on another vessel carrying alleged narco-traffickers, killing 2
items.summary: The U.S. military announced a lethal strike on a vessel in the Caribbean allegedly carrying narco-traffickers, killing two people and leaving six survivors.

items.title: Major dispute to threaten Trump's Iran deal over billions in frozen Tehran funds: expert
items.summary: U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland face their first major test over who controls billions in potentially unfrozen Iranian assets, an analyst warned.

items.title: Meloni's spat with Trump is calculated strategy to boost her approval ratings: expert
items.summary: Analyst says Meloni's public feud with President Trump is a calculated strategy to boost her declining approval ratings ahead of Italy's 2027 general election.

items.title: Albanian protesters flood streets demanding prime minister's resignation amid corruption accusations
items.summary: Albania protests target Socialist PM Edi Rama over corruption allegations, not Kushner investments, former ambassador tells Fox News Digital.

items.title: Iran's unprecedented 'whole-regime' delegation at US deal talks signals one goal: expert
items.summary: Iran sent a whole-regime delegation, including its central bank governor and oil officials to Switzerland talks, signaling demands for immediate cash flow.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Meet the man Israel chose to be its first-ever ambassador to the Christian world
items.summary: Ambassador George Deek explains the mission behind his new role as special envoy to the Christian world and Israel's efforts to strengthen the Judeo-Christian bond.

items.title: Trump says UK's Starmer will resign, wishes him well amid reports of PM's political future
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer will step down, wishing the foreign leader well, while also leveling criticism.

items.title: Trump-backed 'El Tigre' looks to crush cartels, end Colombia's socialist era in pivotal election
items.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella, known as El Tigre, rides voter frustration over crime and cartels in Colombia's high-stakes presidential runoff election.

items.title: African and Caribbean leaders call for payments, debt cancellation, formal apologies over slavery
items.summary: African and Caribbean leaders adopted a 19-point reparations plan in Ghana demanding financial compensation, debt cancellation and formal apologies.

items.title: Keir Starmer reportedly considering stepping down as PM and could announce timetable for departure
items.summary: British PM Keir Starmer is reportedly considering stepping down, with senior Labor figures expecting a statement on his future as early as next week.

items.title: H5N1 bird flu confirmed in Australia for the first time, meaning virus has now reached every continent
items.summary: Australia confirms its first case of H5N1 bird flu in a seabird near Esperance, Western Australia, meaning the virus has now reached every continent.

items.title: Counterterrorism officials investigating after suspect goes on rampage in alleged hate attack: report
items.summary: Counterterrorism officials are investigating after a suspect allegedly went on an anti-Muslim rampage in Edinburgh, leaving five men injured near a mosque and another location.

items.title: Israeli ambassador, UN official shout over each other in tense exchange over sexual violence blacklist
items.summary: Israeli Ambassador Danny Danon erupted at a U.N. official during a tense heated exchange over Israel's placement on a U.N. sexual violence blacklist.

items.title: 'Send them back' chants rock European Parliament after landslide vote to speed up deportations
items.summary: European Parliament approved the Return Regulation 418-218, sparking chants of "send them back" from right-wing lawmakers in a deeply divided vote.

items.title: At least one tourist dead after massive fire nearly destroys Caribbean resort; 1,690 evacuated
items.summary: An Italian tourist died and nine others were injured after a massive fire swept through a Dominican Republic resort in Bayahibe, authorities say.

items.title: Man charged with attempted murder, released after allegedly forcing toddler into crocodile enclosure at zoo
items.summary: A man was charged with attempted murder after allegedly forcing a 3-year-old boy into a crocodile enclosure at a zoo in Huntingdon, England.

items.title: Two-train crash leaves at least 1 dead, 89 injured as emergency crews rush to chaotic scene
items.summary: Two trains crashed into each other near Bedford, England, with an ambulance service confirming at least 1 death and over 80 people injured.

items.title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces potential leadership challenge from newly-elected Andy Burnham
items.summary: Labour's Andy Burnham won a special election on Friday and gained a seat in Parliament. He has openly spoken about challenging Keir Starmer as leader.

items.title: Trump's $300B Iran investment fund may be 'close to impossible' due to IRGC sanctions law, expert warns
items.summary: Trump's $300B Iran investment fund faces legal roadblocks as expert warns IRGC-controlled construction sector creates sanctions risks under existing law.

items.title: From bear hugs to handshakes: How India lost its edge with Trump while Pakistan quietly gained ground
items.summary: Amid India's push to isolate Pakistan, shifting geopolitics have elevated Islamabad's diplomatic profile. President Trump's meeting with Modi suggests New Delhi is looking to regain momentum.

items.title: Iran hardliner behind US deal warns Tehran won’t honor agreement if Trump fails to deliver
items.summary: Iran’s hardline parliament speaker and key negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf warned that Tehran would not honor its commitments under a newly signed memorandum with the U.S.

items.title: 'Pure hell' in Moscow as Ukrainian drones strike major refinery supplying capital's fuel market
items.summary: Ukraine launched one of its largest drone attacks on Moscow, striking a major oil refinery and sending thick black smoke over parts of the Russian capital.

items.title: Finland's parliament votes to lift decades-old ban on nuclear weapons in historic NATO defense shift
items.summary: Finland's parliament votes to lift a decades-old nuclear weapons ban in a historic defense policy shift to align more closely with NATO deterrence.

items.title: Colombian military neutralizes five terrorists accused in bus bombing that killed 20, injured 45 civilians
items.summary: Colombian military forces neutralized five members of the militant group allegedly responsible for the bus bombing that killed 20 civilians in Cauca.
